name: Hidden Valley Ranch Nachos..mmmm..
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange chips in a shallow baking dish.
2. Pour salad dressing over the chips.
3. Sprinkle shredded cheese and sliced green onions evenly over the chips and dressing.
4. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 8 minutes, or until the cheese is melted slightly.
Note: Additional topping suggestions include sliced ripe olives, jalapeno peppers, diced bell peppers. If you enjoy nachos, these will be a favorite!
